01
01
Section 01

Brand Story

The philosophy, voice and four pillars that define everything REVIVE® says and shows.
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
DERMISS® · DERMA-TECH CLINIC · 2026
01
01 · Brand Story

Not anti-aging.
A new biological
approach.

DERMISS® is a derma-tech clinic. REVIVE® is its regenerative method — built on RSL™ · Regenerative Skin Longevity. We move beyond preservation toward regeneration, supporting the biological environment around every cell so skin renews the way it was designed to.
The voice is calm, clinical and confident. Scientific — never loud. Every word earns its place; every surface breathes.
Cellular Truth
Beauty begins inside the cell — not on the surface.
Regeneration
We don't cover. We convert and renew.
Longevity
Results that accumulate, not fade over time.
Environment
A healthy cell needs a healthy environment.
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
DERMISS® · DERMA-TECH CLINIC · 2026

Section 03

Typography

The exact font families read from the references — Montserrat for Latin, Heebo for Hebrew.
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
DERMISS® · DERMA-TECH CLINIC · 2026
03
03 · Typography — Font Identification

The exact fonts in the references.

LATIN — Geometric sans-serif
Aa
Montserrat
closest match · free · Google Fonts
Evidence in the letterforms: perfectly circular O / C, pointed apex on A, uniform stroke weight, high crossbars. Body shows a two-storey a + single-storey g — Montserrat exactly.
Premium equivalents: Futura PT · Avenir Next · ITC Avant Garde · Century Gothic.
REVIVE
Wordmark = Light weight, ~0.42em tracking — the signature.
HEBREW — Clean Hebrew sans
אבג
Heebo
· Assistant · Ploni (all free)
Even stroke weight, open counters, geometric build. Headlines Bold, body Light. Pairs cleanly with Montserrat.
טפלי פחות. תשפיעי יותר.
העור שלך לא צריך עוד תיקון — הוא צריך סביבה שמחזקת אותו.
Weights used
Thin 200 · Light 300 · Regular 400 · Medium 500 · Bold 700 · Black 800
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™

04
Section 04

The Logo

The wordmark, the RSL™ lockup, and the rules that protect them.
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
DERMISS® · DERMA-TECH CLINIC · 2026
04
04 · The Logo
Primary Logo · the company
DERMISS® is the master brand — a geometric wordmark (“DER” bold, “MISS” light) with the DERMA-TECH CLINIC descriptor. Never redraw, recolour or stretch it.
Method marks · under DERMISS
REVIVE®THE METHOD
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
Clear Space
Minimum clear space = height of the “D” on all sides.
Minimum Size
30 mm / 120 px wide minimum in print.
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
DERMISS® · DERMA-TECH CLINIC · 2026
04
04 · Logo Usage
✓  Correct backgrounds
✓
White on deep black
✓
White on charcoal
✓
Black on porcelain
Always preserve maximum contrast. The logo is white on dark, or black on light — never on mid-tones, and never recoloured.
✕  Never do this
✕
Low contrast bg
✕
Busy / coloured bg
✕
Stretched / distorted
✕
Low opacity / ghosted
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
DERMISS® · DERMA-TECH CLINIC · 2026

05
Section 05

Graphic Language

The luminous cell, line icons, the crown and the hairline.
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
DERMISS® · DERMA-TECH CLINIC · 2026
05
05 · Graphic Language
The Cell — our hero motif
A luminous cellular network on deep black. Always monochrome, glowing from within, surrounded by darkness and breathing space.
Iconography
Thin single-weight line icons, rounded joins, drawn inside a circle. Never filled, never multicolour.
Signature mark
The minimal crown closes manifesto blocks — pro-longevity, not anti-aging.
Hairline + light-point separator — used under headlines.
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
DERMISS® · DERMA-TECH CLINIC · 2026

06
Section 06

Three Directions

One identity in three temperatures — the brand-level choice to make.
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
DERMISS® · DERMA-TECH CLINIC · 2026
06
06 · Three Directions

One identity — three temperatures.

All references share one DNA but split into three "temperatures". This is the brand-level choice to make.
ONYX
אוניקס — השחור הקלאסי
Pure black, white & silver. The dominant reference look — clinical, premium, scientific.
#0A0A0A#000000#FFFFFF#A8A8A8
GOLD LAB
מעבדת הזהב — שחור + זהב
Black with champagne-gold accents. The luxury signature variant.
#0A0907#C9A86B#E4D3AC#FFFFFF
PORCELAIN
פורצלן — הבהיר הנקי
Ivory background, charcoal type, antique-gold detail. Soft, feminine, editorial.
#F4F2EE#EAE7E0#1A1A1A#B79255
RSL™ REGENERATIVE SKIN LONGEVITY™
